S

selectAction() - Method in class un.caen.view.ConsoleView
 
selectDirection(PlayerAction, Weapon) - Method in class un.caen.view.ConsoleView
 
selectionPhase(List<Player>) - Method in class un.caen.controller.GameController
Sets the players for the game.
selectPlayerType(int) - Method in class un.caen.view.ConsoleView
 
selectPlayerTypeDialog(int) - Method in class un.caen.view.GameBoardView
Displays a dialog for selecting the type of player.
selectWeapon(Player) - Method in class un.caen.view.ConsoleView
 
selectWeapons(Fighter) - Method in class un.caen.view.ConsoleView
 
selectWeaponsDialog(Fighter) - Method in class un.caen.view.GameBoardView
Displays a dialog for selecting weapons for the specified fighter.
setCell(Item, Position) - Method in class un.caen.model.feild.Grid
Sets the item in the cell at the specified position.
setCell(int, int, Object) - Method in class un.caen.view.GridModel
Sets the value of the cell at the specified row and column.
setData(Grid) - Method in class un.caen.view.GridModel
Sets the data for the grid model from a `Grid` object.
setEnergy(int) - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Increases the player's energy by the specified amount.
setId(int) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Item
Sets the ID of the item.
setItem(Item) - Method in class un.caen.util.Cell
The `setItem(Item item)` method sets the item contained within the cell.
setPlayers(List<Player>) - Method in class un.caen.model.Game
Sets the list of players in the game.
setPosition(Position) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Item
Sets the position of the item.
setPosition(Position) - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Sets the position of the player and updates the position of all owned weapons.
setVisible(boolean) - Method in class un.caen.model.items.Item
Sets the visibility of the item.
setWeapons(List<Weapon>) - Method in class un.caen.model.player.Player
Sets the list of weapons for the player.
setX(int) - Method in class un.caen.util.Position
The `setX(int x)` method sets the horizontal coordinate of the position.
setY(int) - Method in class un.caen.util.Position
The `setY(int y)` method sets the vertical coordinate of the position.
strategy - Variable in class un.caen.model.player.Player
 
Strategy - Enum in un.caen.util
The `Strategy` enum defines the following two strategies: `MOVE` `ATTACK` These strategies can be used to represent the different ways a player or character can approach a game or simulation.
